landing.heroTitle: Bring algorithms out of the lab
landing.heroSubtitle: Let engineers and analysts run Gurobi / TimeGPT-grade algorithms in 5 minutes
landing.heroBody: Most mid-market teams still start from Excel. OptiCloud gives them a one-line API for workflows that used to require heavyweight optimization or AutoML platforms.
landing.helloTitle: Run your first LP solve in 3 minutes
landing.footer: OptiCloud · M0 Sprint 0 · J1 Vertical Slice (Story 1.1a + 1.1b)

signup.wizardDescription: Sign up, verify, get an API key, import Postman, and run the first LP example.
signup.supportDescription: Continue the form, open quickstart, or finish later.
signup.title: Sign up for OptiCloud
signup.subtitle: Get an API key in 3 minutes and run Hello World
signup.pendingDescription: The account was created, but a guardian must confirm by email before login.
signup.phoneHint: Use E.164 international format, for example +8613800138000.
signup.ageHint: Users aged 14-18 need a guardian email.
signup.resumePrompt: Already signed up but not verified?

login.title: Log in to OptiCloud
login.subtitle: Phone + email OTP two-factor verification (FR A1)
login.notFound: No account found for this phone/email
login.agePending: Age gate pending, finish guardian confirmation first
login.invalidOtp: Invalid or expired OTP, try again

guardian.title: Guardian confirmation
guardian.description: After confirmation, the user can continue to login.
guardian.successDescription: The account is unlocked. Return to login to continue.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.riskModalDescription: This key moved from {previousGeo} to {currentGeo}. Revoke it now if this was not you or your team.
apiKeys.riskModalBody: Previous IP: {previousIp}; current IP: {currentIp}; risk score: {riskScore}

welcome.wizardDescription: You are now at API key, Postman, and first LP solve steps.
welcome.supportDescription: Continue the guide, open quickstart, or try later. This prompt does not block the page.
welcome.title: Welcome to OptiCloud
welcome.description: Your first API key is ready. Try the LP solve here or copy the cURL command.
welcome.solveTitle: Try an LP solve without cURL
welcome.solveDescription: Example: logistics assignment with 2 vehicles and 3 customers. Find the lowest-cost delivery plan.
welcome.assignment: Optimal assignment (x = [vehicle1→customer1, vehicle1→customer2, vehicle1→customer3, vehicle2→customer1, vehicle2→customer2, vehicle2→customer3]):
welcome.modalTitle: Registration complete — Hello World is ready
welcome.modalDescription: Copy the cURL command to a terminal, or use the LP solve button on this page.
welcome.apiKeyWarning: This API key is shown once. Copy it now; the full value will not be shown again.
welcome.quickstart: Read the full Hello World quickstart

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link may be wrong, or the page may have been removed.
